building-open-source-cursor-kluster.title: Fix Open Source Bugs In Real-Time with kluster.ai
building-open-source-cursor-kluster.short_description: See kluster.ai in action! Watch how kluster.ai Code Reviews integrate with Cursor to catch and fix bugs in AI-generated code in real time on a Vitest project.
building-open-source-cursor-kluster.long_description:
Hello everyone! In this video, join Kevin as he demonstrates the powerful real-time collaboration between Cursor and kluster.ai Code Reviews on a real-world open-source project: Vitest.

We tackle a specific bug in Vitest related to how trailing spaces are handled in snapshots. Our goal is to implement a feature that clarifies the display of these spaces.

Watch as we use Cursor to generate the initial code. But the magic truly happens when kluster.ai Code Reviews steps in, automatically analyzing the AI-generated code in real time.

*What you'll see:*
- kluster.ai Code Reviews identifies a *high severity issue* in the first pass of AI-generated code.
- kluster.ai provides Cursor with clear, actionable recommendations to fix the identified problems.
- We see kluster.ai Code Reviews continuously monitor and detect a second issue: *improper string escaping* where double-quoted strings were not handled correctly.
- kluster.ai Code Reviews then flags Cursor for being *over-aggressive* with its escaping logic, recommending removal of unnecessary escaping for various characters.
- Finally, kluster.ai Code Reviews gives a *green light*, confirming all issues are resolved and the code meets quality standards.

This demonstration highlights how kluster.ai Code Reviews works *in real-time* within your IDE, catching critical bugs and security vulnerabilities *before* they ever reach a pull request or get merged. It's about ensuring code quality and security as you build, not just after.

Ready to integrate real-time code reviews into your workflow?

Learn more about kluster.ai Code Reviews:
https://docs.kluster.ai/code-reviews/review-modes/

Get started with kluster.ai Code Reviews:
https://docs.kluster.ai/verify/quickstart

Explore kluster.ai documentation:
https://docs.kluster.ai/

#klusterai #CodeReviews #Cursor #Vitest #OpenSource #Debugging #AIinDev #RealTime

customize-code-review-settings.title: Customize Your Code Reviews: Sensitivity, Analysis & More with kluster.ai
customize-code-review-settings.short_description: Tailor kluster.ai code reviews to your workflow! Adjust sensitivity, choose issue types, and set analysis depth (Instant vs. Deep reviews).
customize-code-review-settings.long_description:
Supercharge your development workflow by customizing your code review settings in kluster.ai! This video shows you how easy it is to: 

- Adjust the minimum sensitivity level for issue reporting (Critical, High, Medium, Low)
- Select specific types of issues for real-time detection (Intent, Semantic, Knowledge, Performance, Quality, Logical, Security)
- Control which review tools run in your environment (Ambient Background Reviews, Dependency Analysis, Real-time Code Review)
- Choose your preferred analysis depth: *Instant* for quick feedback or *Deep* for thorough checks.

kluster.ai empowers you to fine-tune your code review process, ensuring optimal balance between speed, thoroughness, and security. Whether you need fast, snappy reviews or comprehensive analysis, kluster.ai adapts to your needs.

Ready to optimize your code reviews? Learn more about kluster.ai:

instant-code-review-cursor.title: Catch AI Coding Bugs in Cursor Automatically with kluster.ai Code Reviews!
instant-code-review-cursor.short_description: See kluster.ai automatically catch critical security vulnerabilities, hardcoded secrets, and logic errors in AI-generated code right in Cursor.
instant-code-review-cursor.long_description:
Are you using AI coding assistants like Cursor and worried about introducing bugs or security vulnerabilities?

In this video, we demonstrate how kluster.ai Code Reviews seamlessly integrates with your Cursor workflow to automatically detect and fix critical issues in AI-generated code.

Watch as kluster.ai catches:
- *Unprotected API Endpoints*: Preventing unauthorized access to sensitive functions.
- *Hardcoded Secrets*: Eliminating security risks from exposed credentials.
- *General Logic Errors*: Ensuring your code functions as intended.

kluster.ai doesn't just flag issues; it tells your AI assistant *exactly* how to fix them, ensuring your code is secure, compliant, and high-quality from the start. We also show how to trigger manual code verification for your own coding changes.

Whether working with AI or coding solo, kluster.ai provides real-time feedback and intelligent fixes, helping you ship confident code.

---

jira.title: Jira Integration: Code Reviews Against Ticket Specs with kluster.ai
jira.short_description: Enhance code reviews with kluster.ai's Jira integration. Verify code against ticket specs, ensuring accuracy and compliance in real-time.
jira.long_description:
Code reviews are crucial, but often miss the mark when disconnected from project requirements. kluster.ai's new Jira integration solves this by allowing you to review code directly against the specifications outlined in your Jira tickets.

This video demonstrates how kluster.ai uses Jira as an *external knowledge source*, enabling intelligent code review that understands your project's context. By connecting your Jira workspace and referencing ticket names in your prompts, kluster.ai ensures that *every line of code* adheres to your exact requirements.

Watch as we:
- Connect a Jira workspace to kluster.ai.
- Prompt an AI assistant to tackle a Jira task.
- See kluster.ai's Code Review identify discrepancies with the Jira ticket specs.
- Guide the AI to update code to meet the specified requirements.
- Verify that the updated code now *passes* the kluster.ai Code Review against the Jira ticket.

This integration helps developers ensure accuracy, reduce rework, and ship code confidently, knowing it aligns perfectly with project goals.

Key features of kluster.ai Code Reviews:
- Real-time scanning within your IDE
- AI-powered analysis of human-written and AI-generated code
- Detection of 7 issue types: Semantic, Intent, Logical, Security, Knowledge, Performance, Quality
- Customizable sensitivity and comprehensive issue detection
- Integration with popular IDEs like Cursor, VS Code, and Antigravity

Take your code reviews to the next level with kluster.ai's Jira integration. Ensure your code always meets expectations.

Learn more and get started:
Code Reviews - Overview: https://docs.kluster.ai/code-reviews/
Code Reviews Documentation: https://docs.kluster.ai/get-started/verify/reliability/workflow-integrations/

Tired of slow and painful code reviews? kluster.ai revolutionizes the way you review code, providing instant feedback regardless of how or where your code is written.

kluster-cli-hooks.title: Automate Code Reviews with kluster.ai Git Hooks
kluster-cli-hooks.short_description: Boost your code quality! Learn how to use kluster.ai CLI Git Hooks for automatic code reviews on every commit and push. Prevent issues before they ship.
kluster-cli-hooks.long_description:
Enhance your development workflow with kluster.ai CLI Git Hooks! This video demonstrates how to set up automatic code reviews that run on every commit or push, helping you catch critical issues early.

With kluster.ai Git Hooks, you can:
- Automate code reviews seamlessly into your Git workflow.
- Block commits or pushes if issues above your defined severity threshold are found.
- Customize blocking behavior based on issue severity (e.g., critical, high, medium).
- Gain instant feedback on code quality, security, and compliance.

Key Commands:
- kluster hooks install pre-commit - Install a pre-commit hook
- kluster hooks install pre-push - Install a pre-push hook
- kluster hooks install all - Install both pre-commit and pre-push hooks
- kluster hooks install pre-push --block-on critical - Specify a blocking threshold
- kluster hooks install pre-push --block-on warn-only - Set hooks to non-blocking (warning only)
- kluster hooks status - Check the status of your installed hooks
- git push --no-verify - Bypass kluster.ai checks in an emergency

Ready to get started? Watch the video to see how easy it is to integrate kluster.ai into your development cycle!

Learn more and get started with kluster.ai:
kluster.ai

Git Hooks Documentation:
https://docs.kluster.ai/code-reviews/cli/git-hooks/

CLI Installation Guide:
https://docs.kluster.ai/code-reviews/cli/installation/

https://docs.kluster.ai/code-reviews/

kluster-cli-quickstart.title: Unleash Terminal-Based Code Reviews with kluster.ai CLI!
kluster-cli-quickstart.short_description: Review staged changes, diffs, or files directly from your terminal with kluster.ai's powerful CLI. Catch bugs and security flaws instantly.
kluster-cli-quickstart.long_description:
Discover how the kluster.ai Command Line Interface (CLI) seamlessly integrates code reviews into your terminal-based workflow. This video demonstrates the ease and power of using kluster.ai to review your code directly from where you work.

Learn how to:
- Review staged changes before committing, ensuring code quality and security from the start.
- Perform a quick review or dive deep with the --mode deep flag for comprehensive analysis.

kluster.ai CLI offers versatile review options to fit every stage of your development process:
- kluster review staged: Analyze all uncommitted changes.
- kluster review diff: Compare your current work against a branch or between specific commits.
- kluster review file: Review individual files without a git repository.

Key Benefits:
- Instant feedback on potential issues like SQL injection vulnerabilities and logical errors.
- Integration with Git hooks for automated pre-commit and pre-push reviews, blocking issues before they reach your codebase.
- Configurable blocking severity to tailor review strictness to your team's needs.

Ready to elevate your code review process? Get started with the kluster.ai CLI today!

Discover how kluster.ai seamlessly integrates with VS Code to provide on-demand code reviews. This video demonstrates how you can initiate reviews for your current file, choosing between an *instant review* for quick feedback or a *deep review* for a more thorough analysis.

kluster.ai identifies potential issues in your code, offering solutions you can implement yourself or leveraging AI to *fix with AI*. You also have the flexibility to *snooze* or *ignore* issues as needed.

Key features covered:

- Options for *Instant Review* vs. *Deep Review*
- Identification of code issues
- AI-powered fixes for identified problems
- Snoozing or ignoring issues

on-demand-code-review.title: kluster.ai Manual Code Reviews: Review Your Code On-Demand!
on-demand-code-review.short_description: Learn how kluster.ai's manual code reviews help you effortlessly catch bugs, security flaws, and logic errors before they hit production.
on-demand-code-review.long_description:
Kluster.ai offers flexible manual code review options to ensure your human-written code is just as secure and high-quality as your AI-generated code. While kluster.ai automatically reviews code produced by AI assistants, you can also easily initiate on-demand reviews for your own modifications.

In this video, we explore four powerful ways to perform manual code reviews with kluster.ai:

- Reviewing the current active file
- Reviewing all uncommitted changes in your workspace
- Reviewing all changes on a specific branch, comparing against a base like 'main'
- Reviewing a selected snippet of code

These manual review capabilities integrate seamlessly into your development workflow, allowing you to catch potential issues instantly within your IDE. Kluster.ai provides detailed explanations of detected problems, recommended fixes, and even allows you to dispatch your AI agent to resolve issues automatically.

Discover how kluster.ai empowers you to ship code confidently by identifying logic errors, security flaws, and performance issues before they become problems.

***

repo-reviews.title: kluster.ai Repo Reviews: System-wide Code Analysis for Bugs & Risks
repo-reviews.short_description: Catch hidden bugs and risks before they hit production with kluster.ai Repo Reviews. System-wide code analysis complements PR reviews.
repo-reviews.long_description:
Uncover bugs and risks that traditional PR reviews miss with kluster.ai Repo Reviews! 

This video introduces kluster.ai’s new Repo Reviews feature, designed to analyze your entire codebase as a system, identifying issues that don’t appear in individual changes. It’s the perfect complement to your existing PR review process, proactively finding problems before they impact production.

Here’s how to get started:
- *Connect Your Repository*: Easily link your GitHub or GitLab account.
- *Select Your Repo*: Choose the repository you want kluster.ai to scan.
- *Review Identified Issues*: After the scan, get a comprehensive list of all issues found.
- *Detailed Insights*: Click on any issue for a description, explanation, affected files, and recommended fixes.
- *AI-Powered Fixes*: Use the ‘Fix with AI’ feature to quickly transfer issue details to your AI assistant for automated remediation.

Repo Reviews is included with all kluster.ai Enterprise plans. Enhance your code quality and security by finding and fixing hidden issues across your entire codebase.

Learn more and get started with kluster.ai:
kluster.ai website: 
https://www.kluster.ai

kluster.ai Code Reviews Documentation:
https://docs.kluster.ai/code-reviews/

Book a demo with kluster.ai:
https://www.kluster.ai/contact-us

#klusterai #RepoReviews #CodeReview #SoftwareDevelopment #DevOps #CodeQuality #Security #AI #GitHub #GitLab

claude-code-auto-review.title: kluster.ai Code Reviews with Claude Code: Automated Security & Performance fixes
claude-code-auto-review.short_description: See how kluster.ai Code Reviews automatically finds and fixes critical security and performance issues with Claude Code. Secure your AI-generated code!
claude-code-auto-review.long_description:
Watch how kluster.ai Code Reviews integrates seamlessly with Claude Code to automatically identify and rectify critical issues in your AI-generated code. In this demo, Claude Code attempts to create an admin API endpoint for deleting product reviews. kluster.ai intervenes with its powerful Deep Reviews to ensure the code is secure, performant, and bug-free.

Here’s what kluster.ai Code Reviews does in this video:
- *Automated Deep Reviews*: kluster.ai automatically analyzes modified files, even those generated by AI, to perform thorough checks.
- *High-Severity Issue Detection*: Discovers a high-severity flaw in the new admin deletion endpoint.
- *Critical Security Vulnerability Fixes*: Identifies and prompts the fix for a critical security issue related to a hard-coded API key fallback.
- *Performance Optimization*: Uncovers a medium-severity performance issue, which Claude Code then optimizes.
- *Continuous Verification*: Runs reviews after each change, ensuring that all issues are resolved and no new ones are introduced.

kluster.ai Code Reviews ensures that your AI-assisted development is safe and efficient, preventing bugs and security risks from reaching production.

For more information, check out these kluster.ai resources:

https://docs.kluster.ai/get-started/api/
